# Check state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print("\nGreen objects:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}, children={n['children']}")

# Check ASCII
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nBoard rows 28-45, cols 30-50:")
for i, line in enumerate(ascii_lines):
    if 28 <= i <= 45:
        print(f"Row {i}: {line[30:50]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
